# Load the provided JSON files and search for matches to the snippet.
import json, re, unicodedata, itertools, textwrap, sys, os, math, statistics

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith_db = json.load(f)

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    tashkeel = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")
    s = tashkeel.sub("", s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace("ـ", "")
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه")
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits/space
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

snippet_full = "إِنَّ الدَّجالَ يُقَوِّمُ صَوْتُهُ بِصَوْتِ النَّاقُوسِ"
norm_snippet = normalize_ar(snippet_full)

# Explore hadith texts fields
fields = ["hadithTxt", "Matn", "matn", "text", "arabic_text", "hadith_text"]
matches = []

for i, rec in enumerate(hadith_db):
    # get matn
    txt = ""
    for k in fields:
        if k in rec and isinstance(rec[k], str) and rec[k].strip():
            txt = rec[k]
            break
    if not txt:
        continue
    n = normalize_ar(txt)
    if norm_snippet in n:
        matches.append((i, txt))

len(matches), matches[:3]
